final:
module RefModule(input       clk, 
               input         we, 
               input         ra, 
               input  [31:0] wd0, wd1, 
               output [31:0] rd);reg [31:0] rf[1:0];

  
  
  
  

  always @(posedge clk)
    if (we == 1'b1)
      begin
        rf[1'b0] <= wd0;
        rf[1'b1] <= wd1;
      end
   assign rd = (ra != 1'b0) ? rf[1'b1] : rf[1'b0];  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
